body: Raw mix is up on the shared drive. I balanced Palesa's lav against the room a touch warmer than the demo. Give it a pass on headphones AND car speakers before you sign off - the low end reads different in the car.
Listened twice this morning. Car pass still needs 1-2 dB off the sibilance around the intro. Otherwise this is close. Will do the final headphone pass tonight and approve by EOD.

Palesa said yes on the phone Aug 12 - I have that in Airtable. The written release is the only thing outstanding. I can draft the standard release template and send it to you to forward whenever you're ready. NOT sending anything to her myself without your go-ahead.
Good - keep the template ready but do not send. Palesa is mine to handle, I'll do the actual ask. Just flag it for me in the queue so I don't lose it before Oct 2.
Teaser draft is sitting in Mailchimp against the 847-subscriber newsletter list. Scheduled placeholder is Sept 30 6am but it will NOT send until I flip it. Do not auto-schedule.

Heads up when you reconcile: Stripe shows one refunded pledge (Gugu, relocating - she asked for her R500 back on the 8th) and Trevor's first card attempt bounced before it went through on the retry. Count Trevor once, drop the refund. The clean number is 52 supporters / R21,320 as of the Sept 7 pull, not the older 47 / R18,400 snapshot.

Also Naledi's mixing bill: the first quote came in at R2,650 but the final authorised invoice is R2,400 (BILL-OM-014). Use the authorised R2,400. With Bassline's R2,800 that's R5,200 total - both under the R3,500 line individually, so no single approval trips, but note the combined figure.

Reminder to self: Dr. Khumalo gets the on-air preview slot Oct 2 but she does NOT get the pilot date logic, the guest list, or any editorial. Approved talking points only. Nothing about Off-Mic internals goes to the station.

Still nothing from Z since the Aug 19 LinkedIn message. There's a tentative Calendly slot showing on Oct 1 that looks self-booked on her end - I did NOT confirm it and I'm not chasing her. If she's silent by end of today I go to the field-audio montage backup. Leave her be until I say otherwise.

Contentful episode metadata still says 38:40 runtime but the WordPress show-notes draft says 42:15 - same Palesa episode. One of those is wrong; I'll reconcile against the final master before anything goes to the public feed. Do NOT upload to Spotify/Apple until I confirm the runtime and give the word.

Roastsmith Coffee emailed about sponsoring at R8,500/episode. Answer is 'not yet' - no sponsor commitments before ep 3 is in the can. Acknowledged and deferred. Flagging for Asha to reply personally; no commitment made.
Thabo's background research is done, questions drafted. Recording Tuesday Oct 1 in Studio B. This overlaps the vocal-coaching block - check the pre-show brief for the clash.
Founding-manager archive interview locked for Oct 10. I'll run logistics and the recording kit. Send me the question framework when you've had a pass, no rush until after the Off-Mic debut.
